● Awakener "Leigh"

Turning HP into Furnace (use this as much as possible)
Turning Furnace into Shield (use this to survive heavy hits, especially in Arc 2 where healing decreases the more you heal)
Turning Furnace into Damage (you mostly only use this to one-shot mobs or to spend excess furnace)
